title: Duck Totem 3D
body:
Duck Totem – A Fun and Whimsical Totem Replacement!
This texture pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a duck, adding a lighthearted and unique twist to your Minecraft survival experience. Instead of the usual golden totem, you'll now be saved by an adorable duck, bringing a fresh and humorous element to the game.

Features:
Totem Replacement: The standard Totem of Undying is transformed into a duck.

High-Quality Texture: Designed to blend seamlessly into Minecraft’s aesthetic.

Lightweight & Performance-Friendly: Won’t impact FPS or gameplay performance.

Compatible with Most Versions: Works with multiple Minecraft versions for broad usability.

Why Download This Pack?
If you love adding small, fun details to your game, this pack is perfect for you! The Duck Totem adds charm and personality to your survival experience, making every close call a little more amusing. Whether you're playing alone or with friends, it's a great way to add a bit of humor and uniqueness to Minecraft.
